'''Task Force Keyhole''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of a [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Keyhole operated under the command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]. It served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]'s plan that culminated in [[Operation Strong Hand]] and was one of the first task forces given clearance to engage during the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
